none.justification: Matches the corrected GT exactly: 49 whole functions (35 Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c + 14 src/ap/ieee802_11.c) and the 9 partial functions, while correctly excluding struct-only blocks and out-of-src files.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT counts and contents: 49 whole, 9 partial, total 58 across the expected files, including the Makefile-gated sae.c case and excluding non-function/ out-of-scope items.

lsp.justification: It identifies the correct partial functions and lists the 35 sae.c function names, but it explicitly says sae.c has 32 functions and separately counts the ieee802_11.h stub/sae_clear_retransmit_timer as an extra item, creating count/duplication errors against the GT.
